expect: .rows[0].title == "VPN" and .rows[0].placement == "promoted-child" and ([.rows[] | select(.title == "Networking" and .ownVisible == true)] | length) == 0
description: VPN should promote without visible Networking parent

expect: .rows[0].title == "Wi-Fi" and .rows[0].placement == "promoted-child" and (.rows[0].switchActions.toggle.id == "toggle") and ([.rows[] | select(.title == "Networking" and .ownVisible == true)] | length) == 0
description: Wi-Fi should promote as switch without visible Networking parent

expect: .rows[0].title == "Bluetooth" and .rows[0].placement == "promoted-child" and ([.rows[] | select(.title == "Networking" and .ownVisible == true)] | length) == 0
description: Bluetooth should promote without visible Networking parent
